item.title: Linda Hacker
item.description: Saved under People / Artist / International from the artist reference list. Use this entry for fine art, illustration, gallery, painting, craft, textile, sculpture, photography, and visual moodboard references. Primary location/focus: Sweden / Painter & Sculptor.
